strategy.name: Leader2 One Each
strategy.summary: 상위 주도 섹터 2개에서 각각 1등 종목 1개씩 매수하고, 6개월 후 50%를 매도합니다. 나머지 50%는 주봉 10주선+RSI 추세가 살아 있으면 최대 12개월까지 연장합니다.
strategy.executionNote: 월말 확정 후보는 해당 월의 매수 기준으로 고정, 주간 업데이트는 관찰과 보유 관리용

accountSimulation.label: Ramp aggressive: 3M 1M/750K/500K
accountSimulation.description: First three months deploy faster: buy 1M when cash is above 3M, 750K normally, 500K when cash is tight; max 2.25M per symbol.

accountComparison.label: Conservative: 5% / 15% cap
accountComparison.description: 10M capital, buy 500K per signal, max 1.5M original cost per symbol.

accountComparison.label: Base: 6.5% / 17.5% cap / 10% cash reserve
accountComparison.description: 10M capital, buy 650K per signal, max 1.75M per symbol, preserve 1M cash when possible.

accountComparison.label: Aggressive: 7% / 17.5% cap / 10% cash reserve
accountComparison.description: 10M capital, buy 700K per signal, max 1.75M per symbol, preserve 1M cash when possible.

accountComparison.label: Over-aggressive: 7.5% / 20% cap
accountComparison.description: 10M capital, buy 750K per signal, max 2M per symbol, no cash reserve.

accountComparison.label: Ramp aggressive: 3M 1M/750K/500K
accountComparison.description: First three months deploy faster: buy 1M when cash is above 3M, 750K normally, 500K when cash is tight; max 2.25M per symbol.
